reception.heroTitle: Efficiency and Precision in Method Validation
reception.heroDescription: Simplifying the alternative methods validation process with real-time collaboration, full traceability, and intelligent data analysis.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Connect proponents, laboratories, and specialists in a single integrated environment for fluid management of validation projects.

traceability.title: Traceability
traceability.description: Total control over every step of the process, with historical data recording, samples, and centralized technical decisions.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Guarantee of integrity and visibility in all phases, from initial submission to the final regulatory decision.

footer.copyright: © 2026 BraCVAM - Brazilian Center for Validation of Alternative Methods
